creator: eugene@zhegan.in
text:
I have one IBM system x3250m2 with two drive bays. I have a mirror on the LSI1068 controller. One day the disk died, I replaced it, but that's what I saw in console:

[emz@wizard:/etc]# mptutil show drives
mpt0 Physical Drives:
   0 (  233G) ONLINE            <WDC WD2500YS-23S 6C04> SATA bus 0 id 11
   1 (  233G) OFFLINE REQUESTED <  > SAS bus 255 id 255
 da0 (  233G) ONLINE            <WDC WD2500YS-23S 6C04> SATA bus 0 id 9
[emz@wizard:/etc]# mptutil fail 1
[emz@wizard:/etc]# mptutil show drives
mpt0 Physical Drives:
   0 (  233G) ONLINE           <WDC WD2500YS-23S 6C04> SATA bus 0 id 11
   1 (  233G) FAILED REQUESTED <  > SAS bus 255 id 255
 da0 (  233G) ONLINE           <WDC WD2500YS-23S 6C04> SATA bus 0 id 9
[emz@wizard:/etc]# mptutil add 0
mptutil: RAID action failed: Invalid state
mptutil: Failed to assign spare: Input/output error
[emz@wizard:/etc]# mptutil add 0 0
mptutil: Reading config page failed: Invalid configuration page

So I see no way to fix this volume.
